sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Philip Morris International (PM) Announces Issuance of $1.5 Billion in Notes
feed.summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (PM) has issued $1.5 billion in notes, comprising $750 million of 4.125% Notes due 2029 and $750 million of 4.875% Notes due 2036. The proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, including repaying commercial paper and refinancing existing notes. This move aims to strengthen the company's financial position and support its long-term corporate strategies.

feed.title: Bombardier CEO sees Honeywell Aerospace spinoff as positive for supply chain
feed.summary: Bombardier CEO Eric Martel views Honeywell's decision to spin off its aerospace division as a positive development for the supply chain, as it will allow the aerospace company to be more focused. Martel noted that Honeywell has improved its performance over the last year, despite earlier supply chain challenges. This move comes as planemakers and large aerospace suppliers, including Boeing and Airbus, are closely monitoring the supply chain's health due to ongoing material and labor shortages.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., has issued $2,250,000 Buffered Digital Notes linked to the performance of the Dow Jones Industrial Average, Nasdaq-100 Index, and Russell 2000 Index. These notes offer a fixed return of 20.00% at maturity if the least performing index's final value is at or above its initial value, or decreases by up to 20.00%. Investors face the risk of losing up to 80.00% of their principal if any index declines by more than 20.00%.

feed.title: Ridgeline Closes $180 Million Fund II Backed by FedEx and Cisco Investments
feed.summary: Ridgeline Capital Management has successfully closed its second venture fund, Ridgeline Ventures Fund II LP and Fund II-S LP, raising over $180 million. The fund, which completed its raise in December 2025, is strategically backed by corporate investors like FedEx and Cisco Investments and focuses on early-stage applied technologies across AI, advanced computing, hardware, and automation. The capital will support startups developing infrastructure and software solutions for modernizing sectors such as manufacturing, logistics, energy, and defense, with Fund II-S being part of the U.S. Office of Strategic Capital's SBICCT program.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Stock (UNH) Rallied Since Earnings. One Insider Is Selling.
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group's stock rallied following strong first-quarter earnings. A high-ranking executive within the company subsequently sold shares, marking their first sale of 2026. This insider transaction occurred after the positive earnings report.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Invitation Homes beats Q1 2026 expectations
feed.summary: Invitation Homes (INVH) reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with EPS of $0.26 and revenue of $734 million, both exceeding analyst expectations. Despite the positive earnings surprise, the stock saw a slight premarket decline. The company highlighted robust operational performance, improved occupancy, and continued strategic capital allocation, including share repurchases and home builder partnerships, while maintaining a cautious outlook amidst elevated expenses and market supply dynamics.

feed.title: Digital Smart Cruise Ships Market Next Big Thing | Major Giants
feed.summary: The Digital Smart Cruise Ships Market is experiencing significant growth, transforming maritime travel into a connected, intelligent, and immersive experience through technologies like AI, IoT, and automation. Driven by demand for luxury travel and enhanced safety, the market is projected for strong growth through 2033. Key players include Carnival Corporation & plc, Royal Caribbean Group, and Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.

feed.title: Full Transcript: Fortive Q1 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Fortive reported a strong start to 2026 with over 5% core revenue growth, 13% adjusted EBITDA growth, and more than 25% adjusted EPS growth in Q1. The company reaffirmed its full-year adjusted EPS guidance of $2.90 to $3.00, expecting to trend towards the upper half of this range. Management highlighted successful AI-driven product launches and consistent execution of its Fortive Accelerated Strategy, which focuses on organic growth, disciplined capital allocation, and building investor trust.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc Stock (MO) Moved Up by 5.80% on Apr 30: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. (MO) stock rose 5.80% on April 30, driven by a strong first-quarter 2026 earnings report that exceeded analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. The company reaffirmed its full-year EPS guidance and paid its regular quarterly dividend, contributing to positive investor sentiment. However, persistent challenges like declining cigarette volumes and regulatory hurdles still exist.

feed.title: AAR Links Woodward Expansion With Airvoyant To Connect Parts And Data
feed.summary: AAR Corp. has expanded its partnership with Woodward to distribute critical engine components and launched Airvoyant, an AI-powered platform for aviation procurement. This dual strategy aims to improve parts availability and procurement efficiency for airline customers by integrating physical supply with digital tools. The company is actively working to connect hardware, data, and workflows for its airline buyers.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Group Reports First Quarter 2026 Results Amid Ongoing Outflows and Shifting Asset Mix
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group reported first-quarter 2026 financial results showing persistent net outflows of $13.7 billion, driven by investor shifts towards passive strategies and alternatives. Despite these challenges, the firm maintained a substantial asset base of $1.71 trillion by diversifying into private markets, retirement solutions, and strategic collaborations. The company aims to stabilize flows and ensure earnings resilience by balancing cost discipline with product innovation amidst a competitive asset management landscape.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: SPG) holds 24.0M shares, 7.38% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a 7.38% beneficial ownership stake in Simon Property Group Inc., holding 24,003,824 shares of common stock. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 3,430,123 shares. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim on April 30, 2026, and reflects a passive investment in the company.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 112.25M SLB shares (7.47%) — SLB Ltd (NYSE: SLB)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 112,250,251 shares, or 7.47% of SLB Ltd's Common Stock, through a Schedule 13G filing. This passive investment disclosure details Vanguard's sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 15,058,564 shares. The holdings are aggregated across various Vanguard-managed funds and affiliated investment vehicles.

feed.title: Don’t Buy the Railroads. Buy the Campbell’s.
feed.summary: This article argues that in technological booms, the "appliers" who utilize new infrastructure often outperform the "builders" who create it. Using historical examples like railroads and the internet, the author suggests that the same dynamic is playing out with artificial intelligence. Investors should focus on companies that apply AI to boost efficiency rather than those investing heavily in building AI infrastructure, with PayPal Holdings Inc. highlighted as a prime example of an "AI Applier."

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: ROST) reports 24.23M shares, 7.49% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported beneficial ownership of 24,227,550 shares of Ross Stores Inc common stock, equating to a 7.49% stake as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard's sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power for a smaller portion (3,207,620 shares). This Schedule 13G filing highlights a significant passive institutional holding by Vanguard in Ross Stores.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management takes 7.49% stake in Realty Income (NYSE: O)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.49% beneficial ownership stake in Realty Income (NYSE: O), amounting to 69,885,864 shares of Common Stock. While Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares, its sole voting power is limited to 9,762,444 shares. This Schedule 13G filing indicates passive investment, with no activist intent disclosed.

feed.title: Aflac (AFL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Aflac reported strong Q1 2026 earnings with diluted EPS of $1.98 and adjusted EPS of $1.75, an increase of 6.6% year-over-year excluding foreign currency effects. The company saw significant sales growth in Aflac Japan (25.5%) driven by new medical and cancer products, and Aflac U.S. sales increased by 2.9% with group voluntary products being a key driver. Aflac returned $1.3 billion to shareholders through repurchases and dividends and emphasized its strong capital position and strategic reinsurance expansion in Japan.

feed.title: ​​​​​​​​International Paper touts $200M in EMEA cuts ahead of business split
feed.summary: International Paper announced $200 million in run-rate savings in its EMEA business, resulting from 31 facility closures and over 2,800 position eliminations, as it prepares to split into two geographic entities. The company reported mixed Q1 2026 results with net sales up but North America packaging sales down, attributing difficulties to macroeconomic conditions, geopolitical factors, and severe weather. Despite lowering full-year guidance, IP is accelerating investments, including a new box plant in Mississippi and an acquisition, while maintaining its strategy to re-invest in the business and implement price increases.

feed.title: Gartner sees untamed growth in agentic AI
feed.summary: Gartner predicts an explosive growth in the deployment of AI agents within Fortune 500 companies, rising from an average of 15 agents per company in 2025 to 150,000 by 2028. These agents are expected to evolve beyond simple text boxes into semi-autonomous assistants capable of handling multi-step processes, although human oversight for security and governance remains crucial. The research firm advises IT leaders to actively sanction and manage agent deployment to avoid the risks of "shadow AI" and to design new processes that integrate agentic AI effectively.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.62% stake in Regions Financial (NYSE: RF)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.62% stake in Regions Financial (NYSE: RF), holding 65,129,715 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 8,964,915 shares. These holdings are attributed to Vanguard funds and affiliated advisory accounts.

feed.title: CrowdStrike vs. Palo Alto Networks: Which Cybersecurity Leader Deserves a Premium Valuation?
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of two leading cybersecurity companies, CrowdStrike (CRWD) and Palo Alto Networks (PANW), to determine which deserves its premium. While CrowdStrike trades at a significantly higher P/E multiple despite similar forward growth estimates, Palo Alto boasts stronger free cash flow generation and a larger revenue base. The article concludes that CrowdStrike suits growth-oriented investors comfortable with valuation risk, while Palo Alto appeals to those prioritizing durable free cash flow and a relatively lower multiple.

feed.title: Vanguard lists 7.63% ownership in Roper Technologies (NYSE: ROP)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 7,863,588 shares, representing 7.63% of Roper Technologies (NYSE: ROP) common stock, as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G filing signed on April 30, 2026. Vanguard maintains sole voting power over 1,055,456 shares and sole dispositive power over all 7,863,588 shares, covering holdings within Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: Stock Traders Buy High Volume of Call Options on Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD)
feed.summary: Stock investors recently purchased an unusually high volume of call options on Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD), representing a 102% increase over the average daily call volume. Several institutional investors also boosted their stakes in Vodafone during the first quarter. Despite multiple analyst upgrades, the stock currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $72.00.

feed.title: Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion (NYSE:VLRS) Given New $9.00 Price Target at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion (NYSE:VLRS) to $9.00 from $10.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment follows a significant earnings miss where the company reported an EPS of ($0.62) against an estimated ($0.04). Analyst coverage for VLRS is currently mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $9.04.

feed.title: May 8 at 8 a.m. ET: TeraWulf plans first-quarter results call
feed.summary: TeraWulf Inc. (Nasdaq: WULF) has scheduled its Q1 2026 earnings conference call and webcast for Friday, May 8, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The company will issue a press release detailing its financial results prior to the call on the same day. A replay of the conference call will be available until May 22, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 6.62% stake in Raymond James | RJF SEC Filing - Form SCHEDULE 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a significant passive investment in Raymond James Financial Inc. (RJF) through a Schedule 13G filing. The investment firm reported beneficial ownership of 13,062,357 shares of Common Stock, which constitutes 6.62% of the class. This filing indicates Vanguard's sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 1,703,664 shares, executed on behalf of clients across its various affiliates and business divisions.

feed.title: Vor Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ:VOR) Short Interest Down 17.3% in April
feed.summary: Vor Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ:VOR) experienced a 17.3% decrease in short interest in April, with the total short interest reaching 4,706,707 shares as of April 15th. This represents 9.7% of the company's float, with a days-to-cover ratio of 3.5 days. The stock was trading up 5.6% at midday, reaching $14.81, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $50.56.

feed.title: Lowe’s Launches MyLowe’s Pro Rewards American Express Card
feed.summary: Lowe's has launched the MyLowe’s Pro Rewards American Express Card, expanding its co-brand partnership with Synchrony. This new card allows pro customers to earn rewards on eligible purchases anywhere American Express is accepted, complementing the existing in-store-only MyLowe’s Pro Rewards Credit Card. The initiative aims to provide flexible financing and a seamless experience for small-to-medium pros, enhancing their ability to manage projects.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Given Sector Perform Rating at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank Of Canada reissued its "sector perform" rating for American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a $195.00 target price. Other analysts have a more bullish outlook, with a consensus target price of $218.05 and an average "Moderate Buy" rating. The stock has seen recent insider selling by COO Eugene M. Noel and buying by Director Rajesh Kalathur, while institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: What's Going On With Altria Group Stock On Thursday?
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) stock is trading higher on Thursday after the company reported strong first-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $1.32, beating analyst estimates. Sales also outpaced expectations, driven by higher pricing in its smokeable products segment and strong performance from its "on!" oral tobacco product. The company affirmed its 2026 adjusted EPS guidance, noting that strong Q1 results should lead to more balanced growth throughout the year despite slower e-vapor industry growth and macroeconomic pressures.

feed.title: Wildfires weigh on PG&E as California sees modest large load demand
feed.summary: PG&E CEO Patti Poppe indicated that the utility's $73 billion five-year capital plan could be revised if California legislators fail to pass suitable wildfire reforms by the end of August. The utility is seeking a holistic package of reforms, including changes to state building codes, to ensure stability for investors. Despite expecting only modest large load growth from data centers compared to other regions, PG&E is actively working to attract data center developers and has 4.6 GW of data centers in final engineering.

feed.title: Vanguard files Schedule 13G: Solventum Corp (SOLV) 10.88M shares disclosed
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing beneficial ownership of 10,875,310 shares of Solventum Corp (SOLV), which represents 6.27% of the class. This filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power for 1,273,361 shares and sole dispositive power for all 10,875,310 shares. The disclosed holdings are primarily for Vanguard funds and managed accounts, with the document signed on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Workday (WDAY), CoreWeave (CRWV) and Figma, Inc. Class A (FIG)
feed.summary: Analysts from Rosenblatt Securities, Wells Fargo, and Morgan Stanley have provided ratings and price targets for Workday (WDAY), CoreWeave (CRWV), and Figma, Inc. Class A (FIG). Workday received a "Buy" rating with a target of $183.75, CoreWeave also got a "Buy" rating with a $135.00 target, and Figma, Inc. Class A was maintained at "Hold" with a target of $44.00, implying a significant upside from its current market price. This report summarizes the analyst consensus and individual ratings for these technology companies.

feed.title: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) Sees Significant Decrease in Short Interest
feed.summary: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) experienced a 21.2% decrease in short interest in April, totaling 6,592,312 shares, representing approximately 2.1% of the stock. While institutional investors have been increasing their stakes, company insiders were net sellers, disposing of shares worth about $5.52 million in the past 90 days. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To L3Harris (LHX) Earnings Beat And Dividend Affirmation
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with increased sales and net income, alongside affirming its quarterly cash dividend of US$1.25 per share. This reinforces its investment narrative as a defense and space contractor committed to capital returns, though concerns about U.S. government budget constraints, particularly in space programs, remain a central risk. The company's forecasts project significant revenue and earnings growth by 2029, suggesting a fair value of US$392.16 with a 22% upside.

feed.title: Wah Fu Education (WAFU) CFO Ai Shuting files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Wah Fu Education Group Ltd.'s CFO, Ai Shuting, has filed an initial Form 3, establishing her as a reporting insider for the company. This filing indicates her beneficial ownership without detailing any specific stock transactions, serving primarily to set her reporting status under SEC regulations. The document confirms her role as CFO and the neutral sentiment of the filing.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 12.85M shares in Regency Centers Corp (NYSE: REG)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported beneficial ownership of 12,845,240 shares, representing 7.01% of Regency Centers Corp (NYSE: REG) common stock, according to a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. This includes sole dispositive power over all 12.85 million shares and sole voting power over 1,554,511 shares. The filing indicates a passive investment stance for Vanguard, with the ownership position dated March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 47.5M ONEOK shares as 7.54% owner (OKE)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 47,489,926 shares of ONEOK (OKE) common stock, representing 7.54% of the class. The Schedule 13G filing indicates that Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power over a smaller portion, 6,622,394 shares, which is typical for asset managers holding passive investments. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Alerus Financial Reports Q1 2026 Results: Full Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Alerus Financial (NASDAQ: ALRS) reported robust financial results for the first quarter of 2026, achieving a net income of $23 million, or $0.89 per diluted share, driven by enhanced net interest income, disciplined expense control, and a diversified revenue model. The company highlighted strategic improvements in its balance sheet, emphasizing growth in Health Savings Account (HSA) balances and strong commercial and private banking relationships. Alerus Financial provided an optimistic full-year outlook for 2026, anticipating mid-single-digit loan growth and low-single-digit deposit growth, while maintaining a strong capital position and continuing share repurchases.

feed.title: Big Tech Is on an AI Spending Spree. Quanta Services Sees Fatter Profit Ahead.
feed.summary: Quanta Services, an AI infrastructure builder, saw its shares rise to a record high on Thursday after exceeding first-quarter earnings estimates. The company also increased its full-year outlook, signaling anticipated fatter profits. This performance comes as Big Tech companies are heavily investing in AI infrastructure.

feed.title: 1 No-Brainer Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy With $190, According to Wall Street
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ: PANW) is highlighted as a compelling artificial intelligence (AI) stock, with Wall Street analysts largely recommending it as a buy. The company is innovating rapidly in cybersecurity to combat AI-powered cyberattacks, launching new products like Cortex XSIAM and Prisma AIRS 3.0. Palo Alto's strong revenue growth, particularly in its next-generation security portfolio, and its undervalued stock compared to rivals like CrowdStrike make it an attractive investment opportunity in the AI revolution.

feed.title: Viasat Completes ViaSat-3 Constellation with Successful Flight 3 Launch
feed.summary: Viasat has successfully launched its ViaSat-3 Flight 3 (F3) satellite, completing its next-generation global constellation. The F3 satellite, designed for the Asia-Pacific region, will provide high-speed connectivity with advanced dynamic beam-forming technology. This launch also coincides with a leadership reorganization and signifies a strategic shift towards reducing capital intensity and improving financial outlook for Viasat.

feed.title: Zurn Elkay declares $0.11 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per share, payable on June 5, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 20, 2026. This announcement follows strong first-quarter 2026 results where the company exceeded earnings and revenue forecasts, leading Stifel to raise its price target and maintain a Buy rating. KeyBanc also maintained its Sector Weight rating, citing solid performance and limited tariff impact concerns.

feed.title: AMETEK, Inc. has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire First Aviation Services Inc.
feed.summary: AMETEK, Inc. announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire First Aviation Services Inc. The transaction was revealed on April 30, 2026, and is pending customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals. This acquisition follows a period where AMETEK's stock showed a 2.71% increase.

feed.title: JA and Delta launch Clayton County “Discovery Center” to help next gen careers take flight
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines, The Delta Air Lines Foundation, Junior Achievement (JA) of Georgia, and Clayton County Public Schools have opened the JA Delta Discovery Center of Clayton County. This new facility, which includes the Delta Dream Accelerator, will annually serve 12,000-14,000 students, offering hands-on experiences to develop workforce readiness and explore career paths. The center signifies Delta's significant investment in the community and its enduring partnership with Junior Achievement, aiming to equip students with crucial skills for future success.

feed.title: American Express® Gold Card Changes: Bigger Spend, Better Perks & Rewards
feed.summary: The American Express Gold Card has new updates, including a higher spending requirement of $8,000 in six months to earn up to 100,000 points. While this makes the welcome offer harder to achieve for some, Amex has also added new benefits like Hertz Five Star rental car elite status, updated dining credit options, and increased point-earning on certain travel bookings through Amex Travel. The annual fee remains unchanged, making these modifications a net positive for many cardholders.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Reports Long-Term Data on Myasthenia Drug
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson reported new Phase 3 data for its myasthenia gravis drug, IMAAVY, showing sustained symptom improvement and reduced antibody levels in patients over 120 weeks. The Vivacity-MG3 study and its extension revealed significant reductions in disease severity scores and immunoglobulin G levels, along with decreased corticosteroid use. These results reinforce IMAAVY's efficacy and safety profile, supporting its long-term use for managing generalized myasthenia gravis.

feed.title: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. Depositary Shs Repr 1/100th Non-Cum Perp Pfd Shs Series W
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. Depositary Shs Repr 1/100th Non-Cum Perp Pfd Shs Series W, specifically focusing on its price-to-earnings ratio. It indicates that data is provided by ICE Data Services and FactSet, with SEC filings from Quartr. The security is listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange.

feed.title: Textron Aviation Revenues Jump 22% in Q1, Parent Plans Industrial Spinoff
feed.summary: Textron Aviation saw a 22% increase in revenues during the first quarter, driven by higher deliveries, particularly of the Longitude jet. Parent company Textron Inc. plans to spin off its Industrial segment to focus solely on aerospace and defense. This strategic move aims to create a pure-play A&D company.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Asbury Automotive Group (ABG) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: This article evaluates Asbury Automotive Group (ABG) following recent share price volatility, using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratios. Both methods suggest that ABG, currently trading around US$201, is significantly undervalued. The DCF model indicates a 64.6% intrinsic discount compared to an estimated intrinsic value of $568.93 per share, while its P/E ratio of 7.10x is well below its industry average and Simply Wall St’s "Fair Ratio" of 13.64x.
